data.title: Whales continue to increase their AAVE holdings, with total holdings reaching $69.66 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, a whale has been operating AAVE in a continuous cycle. 11 hours ago, it borrowed 5 million USDC from AAVE and transferred it to Wintermute to buy 19,608 AAVE, and then deposited all of it back to AAVE. The address currently holds a total of 280,674 AAVE (about 69.66 million US dollars) and has borrowed a total of 32.22 million USDC.

data.title: Metaplanet launches Bitcoin equity financing plan, with a target holding of 210,000 BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Metaplanet CEO Simon Gerovich announced that the company has launched a special Bitcoin equity financing plan with a total scale of 770.9 billion yen (about 5.4 billion US dollars), which will be achieved through the issuance of 555 million "mobile exercise warrants". This is the first time that Japan has issued such products at a premium above the market price, thanks to Metaplanet's high volatility and liquidity.
This plan continues the successful experience of the previous "210 Million Plan", which raised 93.3 billion yen (about 650 million US dollars) in 60 trading days, achieved a BTC yield of 189%, and the stock price has risen more than three times since the announcement. The company's Bitcoin holdings have ranked tenth in the world.
Metaplanet has set a new goal this time: to hold 100,000 BTC by the end of 2026, and to increase to 210,000 by the end of 2027, accounting for 1% of the total supply of Bitcoin. Gerovich said that the company is accelerating towards a future centered on Bitcoin.

data.title: HashpowerX Completes $4 Million Strategic Financing to Accelerate Decentralized Mining, Staking and AI Infrastructure Construction
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Chain staking and income agreement HashPower announced the completion of a $4 million strategic financing, with investors including HashKey Capital, FBG Capital, Hailstone Labs and DePIN X Capital. This round of financing will accelerate HashPower's vision: to expand global decentralized mining capabilities, optimize staking income, and build digital assets and AI infrastructure with real-world application value through an on-chain, permissionless approach.
This financing is based on the important results of HashPower's continued expansion of the ecological and technical landing foundation. Previously, HashPower has signed a memorandum of cooperation (MOU) worth $60 million with many projects including Aethir, Multiple Network, XPIN Network, Planck Network, DI Foundation, Inferix, Bitcoin on Base and Automata Network. The parties will carry out in-depth cooperation in the fields of ecological growth, joint research and development, and decentralized mining, computing power and AI infrastructure deployment.
HashPower allows users to obtain mining and staking income from multiple high-quality projects through staking without holding hardware. By connecting real-world infrastructure with the DePIN + AI-driven token economic model, HashPower opens the door for users to participate in the PoS (Proof of Stake) mechanism and directly obtain tokenized computing power benefits on the chain.
Currently, HashPower relies on its global distributed node network to provide users with stable staking income and infrastructure services through innovative, secure, and user-friendly platform protocols, accelerating the intelligent and inclusive development of decentralized finance.

data.title: Bitcoin's Momentum Weakens Amid U.S. Economic Concerns
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Matrixport's recent weekly report highlights a slowdown in Bitcoin's upward momentum, coinciding with emerging cracks in the U.S. macroeconomic landscape. Two key economic indicators have recently hit multi-month lows, yet most investors remain focused on ETE fund flows. Financing dynamics, stablecoin activities, and forward-looking data suggest potential larger-scale market changes.

As U.S. macroeconomic data begins to soften, an uncertain period may be approaching. The recent strong demand likely stems from market anticipation of U.S. President Donald Trump's tariff policies, accelerating order execution. However, this activity appears to be normalizing. Policymakers may be cautious about prematurely easing policies due to concerns that tariff policies could reignite inflation pressures.

Previously, it was noted that Bitcoin would confirm its bullish trend upon surpassing $84,500. Considering potential market uncertainties during the summer, last week's report advised traders to take moderate profits. Despite recent price softness, the trend model remains bullish, only turning bearish if Bitcoin falls below $96,719—a level that remains intact but is nearing. Given the weakened momentum, profits have been locked in. With early signs of economic data weakness emerging, a period of economic turbulence lasting over two months may be on the horizon. In such a market environment, Bitcoin is unlikely to sustain uninterrupted growth, especially as the Federal Reserve is not yet prepared to cut interest rates and inflation expectations remain high.

data.title: Fed's Potential Rate Cut Could Boost Bitcoin Prices, Analyst Suggests
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, CMC Markets analyst Carlo Pruscino has indicated that the Federal Reserve is expected to maintain interest rates this month. However, an unexpected rate cut could potentially drive Bitcoin to new highs. If the Fed lowers rates earlier than anticipated, Bitcoin's price might surge to $112,000.

Pruscino noted that if the next two rate cuts occur sooner than expected, it could significantly impact the future price trends of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. Traders currently view $112,000 as a crucial psychological target.

He also mentioned that the Federal Reserve has "sufficient data" to make its decision, but uncertainties remain due to U.S. President Donald Trump's tariff policies. The U.S. employment report, set to be released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics on June 6, will be a key indicator for the Fed's rate decision and Bitcoin's short-term price movement.
